name: Coastal Greenland Limited
summary: Coastal Greenland Limited, an investment holding company, primarily invests in, develops, and sells properties in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Property Development, Property Investment, Project Management, and Project Investment Services segments. It also invests in and rents commercial and residential properties; and provides loan financing and management services, as well as invests in land development projects; and offers asset management services. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
